title: Fearless
description: A country-pop album built around big emotions, vivid storytelling, and some of Taylor Swift's breakout songs.
Taylor Swift's polished pop reinvention, full of synth-pop hooks and glossy production.

title: Lover
description: A bright and romantic pop record that mixes warmth, vulnerability, and playful songwriting.

title: Midnights
description: A late-night pop album shaped by introspection, anxiety, and sleek electronic textures.

title: Speak Now
description: A dramatic, self-written Taylor Swift album balancing arena-pop energy with confessional ballads.

title: Red
description: A genre-blending Taylor Swift album that moves between heartbreak ballads and bold pop moments.

title: Teenage Dream
description: A colorful pop album packed with candy-coated hooks, radio-ready singles, and youthful energy.

title: Doo-Wops & Hooligans
description: Bruno Mars' debut album, mixing pop, soul, and retro influences with strong melodic hooks.

title: The Fame Monster
description: A dark electro-pop release from Lady Gaga that leans into theatrical production and bold club energy.

title: Loud
description: A vibrant Rihanna pop album with dancefloor-ready singles and bright Caribbean-influenced textures.

title: Rated R
description: A darker Rihanna album with sharper edges, moody pop production, and defiant attitude.

title: Circus
description: A high-energy Britney Spears pop album built around sleek production, attitude, and big choruses.

title: Recovery
description: An introspective and hard-hitting Eminem album focused on resilience, reflection, and personal recovery.
